goal: Redesign the '争鸣史' main entry button so its visual style is consistent with the other three art buttons while keeping a distinct color family.
constraints: Do not change existing navigation callbacks or menu order.
Keep art-button visual language aligned with start/characters/collection entries.
Apply consistency fix to both MainMenu and HomeScreen entry chains.
deliverables: Story button uses the same base art texture language as peer buttons.
Story button text is clearly '争鸣史' with no English subtitle.
Story button remains visually distinct by color, not by structural style divergence.
